haikus.haiku:
Silken chocolate drapes,
Cashews nestled in sweet dreams,
Joy melts with each bite.
Happy #NationalChocolateCoveredCashewsDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Brush strokes fill the air,
Colors swirling, stories bloom,
Dreams ignite like stars.
Happy #WorldCreativityAndInnovationDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Pages gently turn,
Whispers of wild moors in bloom,
Ink flows like warm tea.
#HappyBirthdayCharlotteBronte from @ClamBakeSanta
